texto: Surround yourself with family and treasure your time together. Family aren’t always blood. They’re the people in your life who want you in theirs
autor: the ones that accept you for who you are. The ones who would do anything to see you smile and who love you no matter what.
explicacao: Citação de the ones that accept you for who you are. The ones who would do anything to see you smile and who love you no matter what. sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Surround yourself with family and treasure your time together. Family aren’t always blood. They’r…” articula reflexao, if-i-wake, family em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
